Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: A user comment on a blog post or quiz.

postId.description: The ID of the post or page the comment belongs to.

userId.description: The ID of the user who posted the comment.

userName.description: The display name of the user.

userPhoto.description: The URL of the user's profile photo.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the comment was created.

Subscriber.title: Subscriber
Subscriber.description: A user who has subscribed to the newsletter.

email.description: The email address of the subscriber.

type.description: The Enneagram type of the subscriber (optional).

consent.description: Whether the user consented to receive emails.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the subscription was created.
